sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83089" key="piqe/sketo" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πιθέσκετο</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Πῐθέω,</orth> <sense id="n83089.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πείθω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
